name: shinden-to-anilist
description: Desktop tool for exporting Shinden lists into AniList-compatible data.
author: Kacper Kondracki

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:45187 && SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_ELECTRON_DEV=1 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_GRPC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:45187 pnpm --filter electron dev
scripts.build:electron:linux: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons:electron
scripts.clean:tauri:appimage: node scripts/clean-dir.mjs dist/tauri-appimage && node scripts/clean-dir.mjs target/release/bundle/appimage
scripts.build:tauri:linux: pnpm clean:tauri:linux && pnpm build:icons:tauri && pnpm --filter tauri build && node scripts/stage-tauri-linux.mjs
scripts.build:tauri:windows: pnpm clean:tauri:windows && pnpm build:icons:tauri && pnpm --filter tauri build && node scripts/stage-tauri-windows.mjs
scripts.build:tauri:windows:xwin: pnpm clean:tauri:windows:xwin && pnpm build:icons:tauri && pnpm build:frontend && cargo xwin build --release --package shinden-to-anilist-tauri --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node scripts/stage-tauri-windows.mjs --target=x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:tauri:appimage: pnpm clean:tauri:appimage && pnpm build:icons:tauri && pnpm --filter tauri build:appimage && node scripts/stage-tauri-appimage.mjs
scripts.package:linux:appimage:bundled: node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs linux && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.export:linux: pnpm build:electron:linux && pnpm package:linux:appimage:system && pnpm package:linux:appimage:bundled
scripts.format:root: prettier --config prettier.config.mjs --ignore-path .prettierignore --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs prettier.base.mjs scripts .github
scripts.format: pnpm format:crates && pnpm format:toml && pnpm format:root && pnpm format:frontend && pnpm format:electron && pnpm format:tauri
